title: Expanding the circle of opportunity: How AI skills unlock local impact
description: A dry leaf lying on the ground took on new life after a primary school student picked it up. With the help of artificial intelligence (AI), the child turned that humble leaf into a charming pattern printed on cotton bags, green read notebooks and bottles—local products made by her community and sold online.

title: AGI is here? Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says yes, but there is a catch
description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang has claimed that we have reached a form of artificial general intelligence (AGI) – a state where AI can think like humans. However, Huang admitted that this AGI has some conditions attached to it. The AI industry as a whole is pushing towards reaching AGI by the end of this decade.
content: Artificial general intelligence, or AGI, is one of the most discussed terms in the AI industry. AGI refers to a state where AI can start thinking like humans – something that can transform society as a whole. While companies like OpenAI and Elon Musk... [2731 chars]

title: Govt to rejig PLI 2.0 sops on high GPU prices, AI server tech
description: The terms of the production-linked incentive (PLI) scheme for IT hardware need to be re-evaluated due to the rising cost of graphics processing units (GPUs) and the emergence of artificial intelligence (AI) servers, a senior government official said on Monday.

title: AI becoming integral to how networks are designed, experienced: TRAI chief
description: artificial intelligence is no longer peripheral to telecom, and is becoming integral to how networks are designed, managed, and experienced, anil kumar lahoti, chairman, telecom regulatory authority of india (trai) said on monday. ai is already enabling self-optimising networks, predictive maintenance, intelligent spectrum management, enhanced cybersecurity, improved energy efficiency, and better customer experience, he noted. “india is undergoing one of the fastest digital transformations in the world.

title: Made Products in Industrial AI Push
description: Siemens Unveils 26 China-Made Products in Industrial AI Push - The German engineering giant introduced new hardware and software tools tailored for the Chinese market, ramping up its push to integrate artificial intelligence into manufacturing
content:
